rows.label: qev055203_MSG0001
rows.name:
Are you... an Earthling?
How did you make it all the way out here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0002
rows.name:
...What? You followed the smoke?
You can see this smoke?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0003
rows.name:
It should only be visible to Orphe, and yet...
Just who are you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_JNK0010
rows.name: Introduce

rows.label: qev055203_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell him you are a BLADE
and that you came to rescue them.

rows.label: qev055203_JNK0020
rows.name: Joke

rows.label: qev055203_SEL0021
rows.name:
Claim to be a hero of justice
entrusted by Yin'otonam.

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0004
rows.name:
I see, I understand.
You were in possession of our goggles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0005
rows.name:
There is one Earthling survivor.
I am truly relieved that you came.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0006
rows.name:
I cannot comprehend that as behavior
from Yin'otonam...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0007
rows.name:
However, it does align with Anna's words.
She kept saying that a hero of justice would surely arrive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0008
rows.name:
We ran away from the native creatures
and kept the smoke burning.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0009
rows.name:
The will of the Ovah conveyed to me
that taking action would be beneficial...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now, the Earthling survivor is up in the large tree.
Please tend to her quickly—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0011
rows.name:
It seems a native creature was lured in
by your scent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0012
rows.name:
I apologize, but I request that you repel it.
We will be hiding up high...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0013
rows.name:
You're safe... Does that mean
you repelled that native creature?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0014
rows.name:
...I see, that is a great help.
This should secure our safety for the time being.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Anna, it is safe now.
It looks like we can return to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0016
rows.name:
Ah... w-we're saved!
Thank you so much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_JNK0030
rows.name: Comfort

rows.label: qev055203_SEL0031
rows.name:
Offer words of comfort, saying you're glad
she's safe.

rows.label: qev055203_JNK0040
rows.name: Tease

rows.label: qev055203_SEL0041
rows.name:
Jokingly remark that you're surprised
she managed to survive.

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0017
rows.name:
But... the seniors sacrificed themselves
so I could live...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0018
rows.name:
If Kan'otonam got eaten by a native creature after all that...
I didn't know... what I'd do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0019
rows.name:
It's all my fault...
I half-assed the vehicle's maintenance,
and it led to this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0020
rows.name:
All I could do... was tell myself
that a hero of justice would come flying in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0021
rows.name:
To think you actually came...
Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0022
rows.name:
It's all my fault...
I half-assed the vehicle's maintenance,
and it led to this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0023
rows.name:
We abandoned the vehicle, kept running,
and managed to move deeper into the forest, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0024
rows.name:
The probability of her escaping the Nightglow Forest alone
was infinitely close to 0%.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0025
rows.name:
That is why I took measures to maximize her chances of survival
and decided to wait for rescue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0026
rows.name:
...Now then, there is no need to linger here.
Her stamina will not hold out much longer.
Let us return to NLA quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0027
rows.name:
I am also quite curious about this "bath"
Anna is so desperately longing for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0028
rows.name:
I thought we were going to die...
so I kept saying that I just wanted
to take one last shower.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0029
rows.name:
Then... everyone, thank you so much!
Kan'otonam and I will head back to NLA first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055203_MSG0030
rows.name:
We were able to return safely.
This is all thanks to you.[ST:wait ]
